creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
A description of /usr/tests is missing from hier(7).
/usr/tests was added to base/head/etc/mtree/BSD.usr.dist as part of r241823.
base/head/share/man/man7/hier.7 should have been edited along with r241823.

Fix: 

Edit and commit base/head/share/man/man7/hier.7 and base/stable/10/share/man/man7/hier.7.
How-To-Repeat: Examine the indicated files on the indicated branches.
